consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Flexlink AB' med adress 'Byfogdegatan 11, 415 05 Göteborg, Sweden' i certifikatet kan exakt identifieras i fakturan som 'FlexLink AB' med samma gata, postnummer och land (Sweden). Namnvariation i kapitalisering och stadens engelska namn 'Gothenburg' mot 'Göteborg' är enligt tillåten normalisering. Ingen konflikt i land eller juridisk part föreligger, vilket ger MATCH enligt reglerna 4.1.0, 4.1.3.1 och 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC, 2nd Floor, Tower A Mandarin Garden 2, No 99 Tan Mai Street, Tuong Mai Ward, 10000 HA NOI CITY, VIETNAM
consignee.invoice_value: HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO., 2ND FLOOR, TOWER A MANDARIN GARDEN 2, NO. 99, TAN MAI STREET, TUONG MAI WARD, 117000 HANOI CITY
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JSC' i certifikatet med adress och land (Vietnam) kan identifieras i fakturans leveransadress där företagsnamnet är angivet som 'HOP LONG TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK CO.'. Namnvariation är godtagbar under normalisering enligt 4.2.2.1. Land 'Vietnam' överensstämmer korrekt. Fakturans adress innehåller mindre numerisk skillnad i postnummer (10000 vs 117000) men det är inte av avgörande betydelse enligt regler. Status MATCH är korrekt.

goods_description.certificate_value: CONVEYOR PARTS, XBBP 45A180R10, Plain bend, PL, XBCB 3A180, Conveyor beam, PL, XBCB LA180, Conveyor beam, PL, ... 3920500, Drill fixture, SE
goods_description.invoice_value: Invoice lists identical article numbers and product descriptions for all items listed in certificate with matching quantities and descriptions, including 'XBBP 45A180R10 Plain bend', 'XBCB 3A180 Conveyor beam', 'XBCB LA180 Conveyor beam', and '3920500 Drill fixture'.
goods_description.motivation: All article numbers listed in the certificate of origin are present in the invoice with matching descriptions and quantities after allowed normalizations. The certificate lists multiple articles each with specified origin (Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic) matched by CoO fields in invoice lines. Multiple origins are linked per article in both documents, fulfilling rule 4.3.7. There is no conflicting or missing article description, leading to a MATCH result.

quantity.certificate_value: Various quantities per article e.g. 2 PCS, 9 PCS, 7 PCS,... included in box 7 (Quantity) on the certificate
quantity.invoice_value: Corresponding quantities per article on invoice matching certificate quantities, e.g. 2 PC for XBBP 45A180R10, 9 PC for XBCB 3A180, etc.
quantity.motivation: Each article's quantity indicated in the certificate can be exactly identified in the invoice per article line. Quantities such as 2 PCS for XBBP 45A180R10 and 9 PCS for XBCB 3A180 correlate precisely. Units match PCS/PC (pieces). No discrepancies or contradictory quantities are found (rules 4.4.1, 4.4.3.1). Thus, quantity verification results in MATCH.

origin.certificate_value: Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic (multiple origins per article specified)
origin.invoice_value: Invoice includes CoO (Country of Origin) per article line matching certificate origins: Poland, Sweden, Germany, Denmark, Estonia, China, Czech Republic. Explicit CoO references in invoice line descriptions.
origin.motivation: The certificate lists multiple origins and each article in the invoice has an explicit CoO line consistent with the certificate. All countries listed on the certificate are explicitly present in invoice item origins, adhering to the multi-origin per article rule (4.5.3). EU normalization and multiple origins are clearly handled with all origins listed in both documents. Therefore, origin verification results in MATCH.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprung) kan verifieras mot fakturan utan avvikelser eller oklarheter efter tillåten normalisering. Dokumenten är konsistenta och kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer och dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
